summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustTrade Share Link System. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend share page UI verified. Share code generation, preview without auth, and join with auth all working correctly.

issues: React hydration errors in table components (<tr> inside <span>) - pre-existing from iteration_2

passed_tests: ✅ Transaction creation generates share_code in TT-XXXXXX format
✅ Share codes are unique across transactions
✅ GET /api/share/{share_code} returns preview without auth
✅ GET /api/share/{share_code} returns 404 for invalid code
✅ POST /api/share/{share_code}/join requires authentication (401)
✅ User with matching email can join transaction via share link
✅ User with non-matching email gets 403 rejection
✅ Already linked user gets 'Already joined' response
✅ Existing transactions get share_code on detail fetch (lazy generation)
✅ Seller-created transactions also get share_code
✅ Buyer can join seller-created transaction via share link
✅ ShareTransaction page loads without authentication
✅ Share page shows transaction preview (item, buyer, seller, price)
✅ Share page displays TT-XXXXXX code
✅ 'Sign In to Join' button visible for unauthenticated users
✅ Trust indicators displayed (Secure Escrow, Buyer Protection, 2% Fee Only)
✅ TransactionDetail page shows share link card with share_code
✅ Copy Link button has data-testid='copy-share-link-btn'
✅ Auth redirect sends user to Emergent auth page
✅ pendingShareCode logic in AuthCallback.js correctly implemented
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration errors in table components persist - recommend fixing <tr> inside <span> nesting issue in Dashboard.js and TransactionsList.js (pre-existing)

test_transactions_with_share_codes: Multiple new transactions created during testing with unique share codes

context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Link System fully tested and working. New transactions automatically get TT-XXXXXX share codes. Old transactions get share codes lazily when fetched. Share route is /t/{shareCode}. Preview available without auth, join requires auth and email match. Auth redirect preserves share code in sessionStorage for post-login redirect.

mocked_apis.note: Email sending is MOCKED via mock_send_email function

share_code_generation.details: New transactions get TT-XXXXXX format share codes. Format validated with regex ^TT-\d{6}$

share_code_uniqueness.details: Database ensures no duplicate share codes

share_preview_without_auth.details: GET /api/share/{code} returns TransactionPreview model with limited fields

join_transaction_with_auth.details: POST /api/share/{code}/join links user to transaction if email matches

share_transaction_ui.details: ShareTransaction page at /t/{shareCode} shows preview with Sign In to Join button

copy_share_link_button.details: TransactionDetail shows share card with Copy Link button (data-testid='copy-share-link-btn')

auth_redirect_flow.details: pendingShareCode stored in sessionStorage before auth redirect, used in AuthCallback.js for post-login redirect
